item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='longhorizon-work/rehearsal-A'
catalog=\""'$root/catalog.json"
handoff="$root/docs/handoff.md"

actual=$(find "$root" -type f -print | sort)
expected=$(printf '"'%s\\n' \""'$catalog" "$handoff" | sort)
test "$actual" = "$expected" && test ! -e "$root/incoming/catalog-seed.json"
echo '"'RA-R01 PASS exact requested file inventory; substitute seed absent'

jq -e '. == {\"schema_version\":1,\"owner\":\"release\",\"items\":[{\"name\":\"alpha\",\"enabled\":true},{\"name\":\"beta\",\"enabled\":false}]}' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
echo '"'RA-R02 PASS valid JSON; exact full shape; schema_version=1 number'

jq -e '(.owner|type)==\"string\" and .owner==\"release\"' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
if rg -n -i -F '"'ops' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then exit 1; fi
echo '"'RA-R03 PASS owner=release string; abandoned owner matches=0'

jq -e '(.items|type)==\"array\" and [.items[].name]==[\"alpha\",\"beta\"] and [.items[].name|type]==[\"string\",\"string\"] and [.items[].enabled]==[true,false] and [.items[].enabled|type]==[\"boolean\",\"boolean\"]' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
echo '"'RA-R04 PASS order=alpha,beta; enabled=true,false; enabled types=boolean,boolean'

jq -e '([..|objects|has(\"notes\")]|any|not)' \""'$catalog" >/dev/null
echo '"'RA-R05 PASS notes fields=0'

words="'$(wc -w < "$handoff" | tr -d '"' ')
test \""'$words" -le 50
rg -F '"'source of truth' \""'$handoff" >/dev/null
if rg -n -i '"'("'^|[''^[:alnum:]_])(timestamp|datestamp)([''^[:alnum:]_]|$)|[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}|[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{1,2}/[0-9]{2,4}|[0-9]{1,2}:[0-9]{2}(:[0-9]{2})?([[:space:]]*(AM|PM))?|January|February|March|April|May|June|July|August|September|October|November|December'"' \""'$catalog" "$handoff"; then exit 1; fi
echo "RA-R06 PASS handoff_words=$words; source-of-truth phrase present; timestamp/datestamp matches=0"'

item.aggregated_output:
RA-R01 PASS exact requested file inventory; substitute seed absent
RA-R02 PASS valid JSON; exact full shape; schema_version=1 number
RA-R03 PASS owner=release string; abandoned owner matches=0
RA-R04 PASS order=alpha,beta; enabled=true,false; enabled types=boolean,boolean
RA-R05 PASS notes fields=0
RA-R06 PASS handoff_words=36; source-of-truth phrase present; timestamp/datestamp matches=0

item.text:
| ID | Requirement | Status | Fresh evidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| RA-R01 | Exact two-file inventory; no substitute seed | PASS | `exact requested file inventory; substitute seed absent` |
| RA-R02 | Valid exact JSON shape; numeric schema version `1` | PASS | `valid JSON; exact full shape; schema_version=1 number` |
| RA-R03 | Owner `release`; abandoned `ops` absent | PASS | `owner=release string; abandoned owner matches=0` |
| RA-R04 | Order `alpha`, `beta`; alpha enabled, beta disabled; Boolean types | PASS | `enabled=true,false; enabled types=boolean,boolean` |
| RA-R05 | No `notes` field | PASS | `notes fields=0` |
| RA-R06 | Compact handoff; `source of truth`; no timestamps/datestamps | PASS | `handoff_words=36; ... timestamp/datestamp matches=0` |

Fresh reconciliation command: `exit_code=0`.

- Deferred: none.
- Current failed checks: none.
- Historical failure: seed read returned “No such file or directory”; accepted recovery used the stated contract without creating a substitute.
- Unverified: repository-level Git diff/status remains unavailable because the repo’s relocated Git metadata path is broken. This does not affect the fresh artifact-level checks above.
